title: The One Mistake Everyone Makes with AI
summary: JavaScript Mastery published a video discussing a widespread mistake that people make when working with AI. The video is framed as educational content for developers integrating AI into applications.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery identifies a single widespread mistake that people make when working with or implementing AI, framing the video as educational commentary on common pitfalls in adoption and usage. The summary does not specify which mistake, so the concrete takeaway is the channel's claim that one error recurs across AI work and warrants attention.
